source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Larger Potions
upgrades.description: Potions splash over more Bloons in a larger area.

upgrades.name: Acidic Mixture Dip
upgrades.description: Throws a helpful potion at nearby Monkeys that allows them to pop Lead Bloons and do extra damage to Ceramic and MOAB-class Bloons. Wears off after several attacks.

upgrades.name: Berserker Brew
upgrades.description: Throws special brew to a nearby Monkey giving it increased damage, range, and attack speed briefly. Multiple Monkeys can be buffed at once.

upgrades.name: Stronger Stimulant
upgrades.description: Extra strong berserker brew has even more powerful effect on the target. Lasts even longer.

upgrades.name: Permanent Brew
upgrades.description: Berserker brew becomes PERMANENT on Monkeys who drink it.

upgrades.name: Perishing Potions
upgrades.description: Attack potions deal more damage to MOAB-class Bloons and strip Fortified off smaller Bloons. Buff potions last longer.

upgrades.name: Unstable Concoction
upgrades.description: Coats MOAB-Class in an explosive substance that causes a large explosion when they are popped.

upgrades.name: Transforming Tonic
upgrades.description: Transformation ability: Turns Alchemist into powerful attack Monster for 20 seconds.

upgrades.name: Total Transformation
upgrades.description: Transforms five Monkeys nearby into crazy attack monsters for 20 seconds.

upgrades.name: Acid Pool
upgrades.description: Every few attacks spills an acid pool on the track, and if no Bloons are nearby Alchemist can drench nearby track with acid.

upgrades.name: Lead to Gold
upgrades.description: Converts Lead Bloons to GOLD! Special solvents do extra damage to Lead Bloons, destroying them in one shot and generating cash.

upgrades.name: Rubber to Gold
upgrades.description: Converts all Bloons partially into gold, disabling Bloon immunity and getting more cash per pop from affected Bloons.

upgrades.name: Bloon Master Alchemist
upgrades.description: Secret shrink potion converts all affected Bloons to Red Bloons.
